sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I’ve been standing in the glow of a borrowed light
Hearing truth like a song in the dead of night
But echoes fade when the morning comes
And I forget what the mirror said I was
I nod my head like I understand
But my feet don’t move when You say “stand”
I memorize every sacred line
Still leave the broken waiting outside

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: If belief is more than sound
Why do my hands stay folded now?
[Chorus]  ← BEST CHORUS
I don’t wanna just hear Your voice
Then walk away like I had a choice
If the mirror shows me who I am
Let me live it out, let me take a stand
Faith ain’t safe, faith ain’t clean
It’s love in action, it’s doing the thing
I don’t wanna just hear Your truth
I wanna be the proof

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I see tongues that bless and burn
Smoke-filled prayers, but no concern
Talking mercy, preaching grace
While the hurting fade into space
If religion’s wrapped in pride
It leaves the weakest far behind
But You’re found where the lost are named
In quiet love, not hollow claims

sections.label: Pre-Chorus 2
lines: If You’re close to the ones ignored
Why am I guarding my open door?

sections.label: Chorus
lines: I don’t wanna just hear Your voice
Then walk away like I had a choice
If the mirror shows me who I am
Let me live it out, let me take a stand
Faith ain’t safe, faith ain’t clean
It’s love in action, it’s doing the thing
I don’t wanna just hear Your truth
I wanna be the proof

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Pure faith wears no disguise
It shows up where the pain resides
Keeps its heart from being stained
While it walks straight into the rain
Orphans crying, widows alone
Heaven listens through flesh and bone
No applause, no holy crown
Just love when no one’s around
Don’t let my faith stay locked inside
A song I sing, but never try

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: I don’t wanna just hear Your voice
Then walk away like I had a choice
If the mirror shows me who I am
Let me live it out, let me take a stand
Faith ain’t safe, faith ain’t clean
It’s love that bleeds, it’s hands unseen
I don’t wanna just hear Your truth
I wanna be the proof

sections.label: Outro
lines: Let my life say what my lips confess
Love unstained, love expressed
